basic_details.short_information: Raman Research Institute (RRI) Director Notification 2026 has been released on 02 March 2026 on the official website www.rri.res.in. Has been announced through the RRI Director Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctorate in Physical Sciences, Post-Doctoral Research
qualification.details: Doctorate in Physical Sciences. Post-Doctoral Research. Original published work of high standard and/or National and International Patents. Evidence of high professional eminence by way of recognitions like fellowship of academies and national/international awards in science and technology. At least 25 years of experience in R&D in academic institutions/research institutions and/or science and technology organisations or as faculty/scientist of recognised national/international universities/research institutes/corporate R&D Labs etc., out of which at least 6 years should be in managerial/administrative capacity.

selection_process: Search-cum-Selection Committee consideration of applications and nominations
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RRI Director Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.rri.res.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download RRI Director Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RRI Director recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the RRI Director position is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Director post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Doctorate in Physical Sciences, possess post-doctoral research experience, and have original published work of high standard or patents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Director position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Director post is 56 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Director role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Director position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 2,25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this RRI Director recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Director position at RRI?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application form from the official website and send the completed form with required documents via post.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the Raman Research Institute.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website of Raman Research Institute?
faq.answer: The official website of Raman Research Institute is http://www.rri.res.in, where you can find more details and download the application form.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Director post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves consideration of applications and nominations by a Search-cum-Selection Committee.
